# Chlorin ring light absorption

## Short Teaching Summary
Sidechains bound to the chlorin ring cause the absorption spectrum of light to vary, which affects the chlorophyll's color.

## Difficulty
0.50

## Prerequisites
- Plant making food from light
- Chlorophyll structure
- Molecule part causing color

## Related Concepts
- Plant making food from light (requires)
- Chlorophyll structure (requires)
- Molecule part causing color (requires)
